tech_selection.video_playback: Media3 (ExoPlayer) — 理由：Google官方推荐，支持字幕渲染、变速播放、生命周期管理
tech_selection.video_download: youtubedl-android — 理由：yt-dlp Android wrapper，支持B站视频解析下载
tech_selection.audio_encryption: security-crypto EncryptedFile (AES256-GCM) — 理由：项目已有声明，Android Keystore保护密钥
tech_selection.voice_recording: android.media.MediaRecorder (AAC) — 理由：系统API零额外依赖，16000Hz采样率匹配ASR输入要求
tech_selection.ai_transcription_assessment: DeepSeek API — 理由：复用现有AiApiClient基础设施和API Key, v1文本级差异分析
tech_selection.phoneme_reference_audio: assets内置44个IPA音素MP3 — 理由：完全离线，无网络依赖
tech_selection.progress_charts: Compose Canvas自绘 — 理由：避免引入MPAndroidChart依赖，更灵活适配Compose主题
tech_selection.dependency_injection: Hilt — 理由：项目已全面使用Hilt，新增ShadowingModule和PronunciationModule即可
tech_selection.database: Room — 理由：项目已有且深度使用，新增5张表无需引入新ORM

implementation_path.name: 数据层 (Room表+DAO+Repository)
implementation_path.description: 定义5张新增Room表的@Entity/@Dao、Room Database版本迁移、Entity↔Domain Model映射

implementation_path.name: 领域层 (UseCase/Model)
implementation_path.description: 定义Repository接口和实现、PronunciationAssessor服务、各UseCase业务封装
deliverables: Domain Models: ShadowingVideo, ShadowingSentence, ShadowingRecord, PronunciationAssessment, PhonemeScore, WordTiming

implementation_path.name: UI层 (Compose Screen)
implementation_path.description: 实现所有Compose屏幕和可复用组件，集成Media3 ExoPlayer，录音控制，评分可视化

implementation_path.name: 集成与测试
implementation_path.description: Hilt Module注册、build.gradle依赖、Manifest权限声明、Room Migration测试、端到端集成测试
deliverables: E2E集成测试 (导入→播放→录音→测评→展示)

key_algorithms: 句子分割策略：解析SRT/VTT字幕→按标点符号分句→合并过短片段(<1s)→分割过长片段(>15s)→输出句级ShadowingSentence列表，分割边界优先对齐字幕时间轴
发音评分算法v1：Audio→DeepSeek ASR转录文本→目标文本+转录文本→DeepSeek API文本级差异分析→整体评分(0-100)+逐词差异+音素级纠正建议，从准确度/流利度/完整度三维评价

interface_schema.ShadowingVideoDao: @Dao interface ShadowingVideoDao { observeAll(): Flow<List<ShadowingVideoEntity>>; getById(id: Long): ShadowingVideoEntity?; insert(video: ShadowingVideoEntity): Long; update(video: ShadowingVideoEntity): Unit; deleteById(id: Long): Unit }
interface_schema.ShadowingSentenceDao: @Dao interface ShadowingSentenceDao { observeByVideoId(videoId: Long): Flow<List<ShadowingSentenceEntity>>; insertBatch(sentences: List<ShadowingSentenceEntity>): List<Long>; update(sentence: ShadowingSentenceEntity): Unit; deleteByVideoId(videoId: Long): Unit }
interface_schema.ShadowingRecordDao: @Dao interface ShadowingRecordDao { observeBySentenceId(sentenceId: Long): Flow<List<ShadowingRecordEntity>>; getBySentenceId(sentenceId: Long): List<ShadowingRecordEntity>; insert(record: ShadowingRecordEntity): Long; deleteById(id: Long): Unit }
interface_schema.AssessmentRecordDao: @Dao interface AssessmentRecordDao { observeByRecordId(recordId: Long): Flow<AssessmentRecordEntity?>; observeBySentenceId(sentenceId: Long): Flow<List<AssessmentRecordEntity>>; insert(assessment: AssessmentRecordEntity): Long; getPhonemeScores(assessmentId: Long): List<PhonemeScoreEntity> }
interface_schema.PhonemeScoreDao: @Dao interface PhonemeScoreDao { insertBatch(scores: List<PhonemeScoreEntity>): List<Long>; getByAssessmentId(assessmentId: Long): List<PhonemeScoreEntity> }
interface_schema.ShadowingRepository: interface ShadowingRepository { observeVideos(): Flow<List<ShadowingVideo>>; getVideoById(videoId: Long): ShadowingVideo?; deleteVideo(videoId: Long); getSentencesForVideo(videoId: Long): Flow<List<ShadowingSentence>>; saveRecording(videoId, sentenceId, audioFilePath, durationMs): Long; getRecordingsForSentence(sentenceId: Long): List<ShadowingRecord>; deleteRecording(recordId: Long) }
interface_schema.VideoImportService: class VideoImportService @Inject constructor(context: Context, shadowingVideoDao: ShadowingVideoDao) { downloadFromBilibili(url: String): Result<ShadowingVideoEntity>; importLocalVideo(uri: Uri): Result<ShadowingVideoEntity>; cancelDownload(videoId: Long) }
interface_schema.PronunciationAssessor: class PronunciationAssessor @Inject constructor(aiApiClient: AiApiClient, appConfigDao: AppConfigDao) { suspend fun assessPronunciation(sentenceText: String?, targetText: String, recordedText: String, wordTimings: List<WordTiming>? = null): PronunciationAssessment; suspend fun transcribeAudio(audioFilePath: String, language: String = "en"): TranscriptionResult }
interface_schema.ShadowingViewModel: @HiltViewModel class ShadowingViewModel @Inject constructor(shadowingRepository: ShadowingRepository, videoImportService: VideoImportService) — UiState: ShadowingUiState (StateFlow), Event: ShadowingEvent (sealed interface)
interface_schema.PronunciationViewModel: @HiltViewModel class PronunciationViewModel @Inject constructor(pronunciationAssessor: PronunciationAssessor, shadowingRepository: ShadowingRepository) — UiState: PronunciationUiState (StateFlow), Event: PronunciationEvent (sealed interface)

test_strategy.M1_数据层: Room in-memory database测试每个DAO的CRUD+Flow观察；Migration测试验证旧→新版本数据完整性；VideoImportService使用MockWebServer模拟B站下载响应
test_strategy.M1_领域层: 纯JVM单元测试（MockK），覆盖ImportVideoUseCase分支（成功/网络错误/格式不支持）；SaveRecordingUseCase的加密写入路径
test_strategy.M1_ViewModel: TestCoroutineDispatcher + Mock Repository，验证每个ShadowingEvent处理后的UiState变更（视频列表加载、录音状态机、下载进度更新）
test_strategy.M1_UI层: Compose UI Test (createComposeRule)，验证视频列表渲染、播放器状态、字幕高亮、录音按钮交互、句子时间轴点击跳转
test_strategy.M2_数据层: Room in-memory测试AssessmentRecordDao + PhonemeScoreDao的CRUD和外键级联操作；批量insert与按assessmentId查询
test_strategy.M2_领域层: Mock AiApiClient + MockWebServer录制DeepSeek API响应，验证transcribeAudio和assessPronunciation的提示词构造与响应解析；覆盖API超时/失败错误处理
test_strategy.M2_ViewModel: Mock Repository + Turbine测试StateFlow，验证AssessPronunciation触发assessor调用、录音状态机转换、历史记录加载
test_strategy.M2_UI层: Compose UI Test，验证评分展示、音素颜色映射(红/黄/绿)、纠正建议卡片展开收起、空状态显示
test_strategy.跨模块集成: Robolectric + Room in-memory + mock ExoPlayer + mock AiApiClient，覆盖完整E2E流程：导入→播放→录音→测评→评分展示

M1_F1_B站导入.reason: 依赖youtubedl-android，B站反爬规则可能变更；国产ROM兼容性未经验证
M1_F1_B站导入.mitigation: 提供本地文件导入兜底路径；下载失败提示切换到SAF文件选择器

M1_F2_本地导入.reason: SAF URI→ContentResolver复制，Android标准API稳定可靠

M1_F3_视频播放.reason: Media3成熟稳定但字幕同步精度需要调优；不同视频解码格式需测试
M1_F3_视频播放.mitigation: 使用Media3内置SubtitleView；覆盖主流视频格式测试

M1_F4_句子分割.reason: v1依赖ASR/字幕质量，边界情况（无字幕/双语/乱码）多
M1_F4_句子分割.mitigation: 提供手动输入文本后备方案；实现后处理分割兜底

M1_F5_录音回放.reason: RECORD_AUDIO运行时权限；MediaRecorder国产ROM兼容性；加密回放延迟
M1_F5_录音回放.mitigation: 权限申请遵循最佳实践；加密回放增加缓冲预加载

M1_F6_进度管理.reason: 纯Room CRUD操作，无外部依赖
M1_F6_进度管理.mitigation: Room单元测试覆盖所有进度CRUD

M2_F1_整体评分.reason: v1纯文本级分析不如声学特征精准，对发音错误可能漏报/误报；API调用需要网络
M2_F1_整体评分.mitigation: 提示词提供明确评分标准和示例；v2计划接入whisper.cpp音素级评分；离线时禁用并提示

M2_F2_音素评分.reason: v1无音素对齐模型，只能通过LLM文本分析近似推断音素差异；数据量随测评增长
M2_F2_音素评分.mitigation: v1明确定位为近似评分并UI标注；v2升级到whisper.cpp+GOP评分；定期归档历史

M2_F3_ASR转录.reason: 非英语母语用户口音导致ASR转写质量下降
M2_F3_ASR转录.mitigation: 提供用户手动修正转录文本功能；assessPronunciation传入原文做参考修正

Cross_M1_M2.reason: M2依赖M1 ShadowingRepository接口，并行开发时接口变更可能导致编译错误
Cross_M1_M2.mitigation: 早定义Repository interface并锁定contract；通过外键record_id实现跨模块关联
